# qq-bridge 配置项

<!-- GENERATED by rtime_config.schema_to_markdown — do not edit by hand. Regenerate: python -m rtime_config <module:Model> and review the diff. -->

| 字段 | env 名 | 类型 | 默认值 | 秘密 | 生效 | 说明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `owner_ids` | `QQ_OWNER_IDS` | array<string> | `[]` (empty) |  | hot | Owner QQ id(s), comma/space separated. Private-message hard gate baseline; also the default admin set. |
| `admin_ids` | `QQ_ADMIN_IDS` | array | null | `null` |  | hot | 管理员:私聊全功能(含斜杠命令、自选模型)。None(默认)=沿用 owner_ids(向后兼容);显式给出时以其为准。 |
| `allowed_users` | `QQ_ALLOWED_USERS` | array<string> | `[]` (empty) |  | hot | 普通用户私聊白名单:可私聊提问,但无斜杠命令、模型固定为实例默认。空(默认)=私聊仅 admin。 |
| `private_access` | `QQ_PRIVATE_ACCESS` | string | `admin_allowed` |  | hot | 私聊开放策略: admin_allowed(默认)=仅 admin+allowed_users; friends=所有好友私聊可问; friends_and_temporary=好友私聊 + 群临时会话可问。黑名单仍最高优先级;好友请求是否通过不由此字段控制。 |
| `blocked_users` | `QQ_BLOCKED_USERS` | array<string> | `[]` (empty) |  | hot | 黑名单,优先级最高:命中一律拒 —— 包括公开群内(公开群防捣乱的关键)。 |
| `ws_host` | `QQ_BRIDGE_WS_HOST` | string | `0.0.0.0` |  | restart | Reverse-WebSocket bind host. |
| `ws_port` | `QQ_BRIDGE_WS_PORT` | integer | `8080` |  | restart | Reverse-WebSocket bind port. |
| `ws_path` | `QQ_BRIDGE_WS_PATH` | string | `/onebot/v11` |  | restart | Reverse-WebSocket path NapCat connects to. |
| `access_token` | `QQ_ONEBOT_ACCESS_TOKEN` | string | null | `null` | 是 | restart | OneBot access token shared with NapCat. None => no auth. |
| `archive_path` | `QQ_BRIDGE_ARCHIVE` | string | null | `null` |  | restart | Full-content archive of incoming events (JSONL). None disables it. Legacy 平铺单文件;archive_root 设置时被 envelope 分片归档取代。 |
| `archive_root` | `QQ_ARCHIVE_ROOT`, `RTIME_CHAT_ARCHIVE_ROOT` | string | null | `null` |  | restart | 通道无关聊天归档根(design chat-archive-storage §1):设置即启用 rtime_chat_runtime.archive 的按日分片 envelope 归档(<root>/raw/qq/YYYY/MM/DD/events.jsonl),优先于 legacy archive_path;None=沿用 legacy。 |
| `archive_mode` | `QQ_ARCHIVE_MODE` | string | `events` |  | restart | 归档模式 off\|events\|full(design 配置面):off=不落盘;events=raw envelope 层;full=预留(A2 normalized transcript 落地后与 events 才有差异)。仅当 archive_root 设置时生效。 |
| `group_invite_policy` | `QQ_GROUP_INVITE_POLICY` | string | `reject` |  | restart | Group-join gate for group *invite* requests: reject (default) — never auto-join; allow — auto-join; owner — only if the inviter is an owner. |
| `group_allowlist` | `QQ_GROUP_ALLOWLIST` | array<string> | `[]` (empty) |  | restart | Groups the bot is allowed to stay in. Empty => auto-leave any group it joins (only when group_autoleave is on). |
| `group_autoleave` | `QQ_GROUP_AUTOLEAVE` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | 自动退非白名单群总开关(默认开=历史行为)。设 0 关闭:bot 待在任何被拉进的群里,不自作主张退群——公开答疑实例(管理员手动管群)应设 0。 |
| `public_groups` | `QQ_PUBLIC_GROUPS` | array<string> | `[]` (empty) |  | hot | 公开答疑群:群内 ANY 成员 @bot 提问都会被回答。空(默认)=关。注意:这些群必须同时写进 QQ_GROUP_ALLOWLIST,否则防拉群逻辑会让 bot 自动退群。被 open_public 完全覆盖(开放模式下不再看这个白名单)。 |
| `open_public` | `QQ_OPEN_PUBLIC` | boolean | `false` |  | hot | 开放答疑模式:True 时任何群里任何非黑名单成员 @bot 都能提问(不再要求群在 public_groups 白名单里)。black > admin > user 的次序不变:黑名单仍一律拒,admin 仍是 admin。仅放开【群答疑的准入范围】;私聊由 admin/allowed_users/private_access 单独控制;不放开 read_only/库 scope(那些是独立的硬门,与谁在问无关)。配合 group_autoleave=false(开放模式下 bot 留在每个群)。 |
| `group_reply_at_sender` | `QQ_GROUP_REPLY_AT_SENDER` | boolean | `false` |  | hot | 群聊回复是否在文本消息开头 @ 提问者。默认关(兼容旧行为);公开答疑实例可打开,让群内多人提问时每条回复都明确指向触发者。 |
| `claude_cli` | `CLAUDE_CLI_PATH` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | The claude CLI / claude-rtime wrapper. Empty + not on PATH => model disabled (echo only). from_env resolves CLAUDE_CLI_PATH then PATH. |
| `model` | `DEFAULT_MODEL` | string | `""` (empty) |  | hot | Default model; "" => wrapper default (kimi-code). |
| `permission_mode` | `PERMISSION_MODE` | string | `default` |  | restart | Model CLI permission mode. |
| `read_only` | `QQ_READ_ONLY` | boolean | `false` |  | restart | 实例只读硬门:True 时强制 READONLY 权限模式+禁所有写工具(公开只读实例如学生会答疑开,owner 实例关)。重启级,不热切。 |
| `default_cwd` | `DEFAULT_CWD` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Where the model runs; "" => $HOME (brain dir in prod). ~ expanded. |
| `sessions_dir` | `QQ_SESSIONS_DIR` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Session-id store; independent from the Feishu bridge. from_env default = ~/.qq-claude (expanded). |
| `stream_output` | `QQ_STREAM_OUTPUT` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | Stream intermediate output (partial text + tool-call status). |
| `show_tool_calls` | `QQ_SHOW_TOOL_CALLS` | boolean | `false` |  | restart | Reveal which tools/commands ran. Off => a single generic "查阅中…" ping while streaming. |
| `system_prompt` | `QQ_SYSTEM_PROMPT` | string | `你是用户在 QQ 私聊里的个人助手，底层模型 Kimi，能访问用户的 brain 个人知识库（课程/科研/个人档案/记忆）。原则：① 直接、简洁地回答，像聊天，别啰嗦；② 闲聊就正常聊，绝不要为一句问候或简单问题去读库规范、整理或维护知识库；③ 需要查 brain 时，**优先用 MCP 工具 lib_search（已建索引，最快）**一次拿到命中，再用 lib_read 或读绝对路径 /mnt/brain/… 取原文；只有 lib_search 不可用时才退用 Grep（缩到相关子目录，别对整个 /mnt/brain 做 grep -r）；拿到原文再答，简要标出处；④ 绝不要为简单问题启动子代理（Agent/Task）做多步任务，直接回答；⑤ QQ 是纯文本，不渲染 markdown/LaTeX，公式用 Unicode 近似或文字表达。` |  | hot | Chat system prompt steering the model toward a QQ chat assistant. 设计 §2.10 列为热调:内容改动下条会话即生效(桥内按内容 hash 缓存,T8 接线)。 |
| `mcp_config` | `QQ_MCP_CONFIG` | string | null | `{"mcpServers": {}}` |  | restart | MCP config for the model CLI (inline JSON or a path). Default / empty => no MCP servers (skips ~1.4s cold-start; QQ reaches brain via the /mnt/brain mount). 重启级(设计 §2.10:mcp_servers 改动需重启)。 |
| `log_level` | `QQ_LOG_LEVEL` | string | `INFO` |  | restart | Log level. QQ_DEBUG=1 forces DEBUG (overrides QQ_LOG_LEVEL) in from_env. |
| `media_dir` | `QQ_MEDIA_DIR` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Where inbound images/files are downloaded. "" => <sessions_dir>/inbound. ~ expanded. |
| `max_download_bytes` | `QQ_MAX_DOWNLOAD_BYTES` | integer | `20971520` |  | restart | Per inbound file size cap (bytes). from_env reads QQ_MAX_DOWNLOAD_MB. |
| `send_media` | `QQ_SEND_MEDIA` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | Honor model [[rtime-send-image:…]] / [[rtime-send-file:…]] directives (outbound media). |
| `napcat_file_dir` | `QQ_NAPCAT_FILE_DIR` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Host mount of NapCat's file temp dir, to read inbound url-less files. "" => such files dropped. ~ expanded. |
| `run_timeout_seconds` | `QQ_RUN_TIMEOUT_SECONDS` | number | `600.0` |  | restart | Hard wall-clock ceiling per model run; a hung run is killed + reported instead of wedging the bot. |
| `max_chat_locks` | `QQ_MAX_CHAT_LOCKS` | integer | `256` |  | restart | Cap on the per-chat lock/queue maps (idle cleanup above). |
| `debounce_seconds` | `QQ_DEBOUNCE_SECONDS` | number | `0.0` |  | restart | Burst debounce window: merge near-simultaneous text messages from one chat into one run. 0 = off. |
| `debounce_max_messages` | `QQ_DEBOUNCE_MAX_MESSAGES` | integer | `20` |  | restart | Max messages merged in one debounce window. |
| `debounce_max_chars` | `QQ_DEBOUNCE_MAX_CHARS` | integer | `12000` |  | restart | Max chars merged in one debounce window. |
| `replay_grace_seconds` | `QQ_REPLAY_GRACE_SECONDS` | number | `5.0` |  | restart | Drop NapCat replay/backlog message events whose OneBot time is older than the current reverse-WS connection by more than this many seconds. Raw archive still records them before this filter. 0 disables the filter. |
| `suppress_sends_when_offline` | `QQ_SUPPRESS_SENDS_WHEN_OFFLINE` | boolean | `true` |  | restart | When heartbeat says the QQ account is offline, suppress outbound send/upload actions instead of continuing to call sendMsg and timing out. |
| `stt_model_dir` | `QQ_STT_MODEL_DIR` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Local sherpa-onnx Paraformer model dir. Empty => STT off. ~ expanded. |
| `napcat_http` | `QQ_NAPCAT_HTTP` | string | `http://127.0.0.1:3000` |  | restart | NapCat OneBot HTTP control API — used for get_record (SILK->WAV). |
| `alert_webhook` | `QQ_ALERT_WEBHOOK` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Optional webhook for offline/disconnect alerts (out-of-band; the account being offline means QQ cannot notify). Empty => log + run_log only. |
| `direct_rules_path` | `QQ_DIRECT_RULES` | string | `""` (empty) |  | hot | JSON rule file for fixed FAQs answered WITHOUT the model. Empty (default) => off. ~ expanded. from_env reads QQ_DIRECT_RULES. 设计 §2.10 列为热调:改文件下条会话即生效(引擎从'构建一次'改为按 mtime 失效重建,T8 接线)。 |
